executives.name: David Hornik
executives.background: David Hornik has served as a member of our board of directors since May 2013 and as the lead independent director since April 2023. Mr. Hornik is a founding partner of Lobby Capital, a venture capital firm, which he joined in 2021.

executives.name: Merline Saintil
executives.background: Ms. Saintil has served as a member of the Board since 2021. She is an experienced technology executive and board member, having held leadership roles at Intuit, Yahoo!, and PayPal.
